title: 2026 H1 投资标的复盘
summary: 研报中心 19 个当前标的的半年度复盘：AI 基础设施关键瓶颈判断准确（AMD、SK hynix、Bloom），但回报右偏（均值约 +32% vs 中位数约 +3.5%），且赢家多被估值纪律压成中性。Salesforce 暴露 SaaS 被 AI 叙事压估值的系统性风险，Netflix/WBD 暴露 M&A 证据门槛不足。H2 重点是补 NVIDIA、电力基础设施、自定义 ASIC，并建立「强 thesis + 贵估值」仓位矩阵。
summaryEn: Semi-annual review of 19 current research-center names: the AI-infrastructure bottleneck call was right (AMD, SK hynix, Bloom), but returns were right-skewed (mean ~+32% vs median ~+3.5%) and winners were often held neutral on valuation. Salesforce exposed the systemic risk of AI-driven SaaS multiple compression; Netflix/WBD exposed a weak M&A evidence bar. H2 priorities are NVIDIA, power infrastructure, custom ASICs and a sizing matrix for strong-thesis / stretched-valuation names.
